title: selaginella sungemagneana
intro: Selaginella sungemagneana is a type of ancient, small, and delicate plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as resurrection ferns due to their ability to revive after periods of dehydration. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella sungemagneana is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
